commit.subject: LU-11173 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.140-94.42]
commit.message:
LU-11173 kernel: kernel update [SLES12 SP3 4.4.140-94.42]

Update SLES12 SP3 kernel to 4.4.140-94.42.

Test-Parameters: mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
clientdistro=sles12sp3 ossdistro=sles12sp3 mdsdistro=sles12sp3 \
testgroup=review-ldiskfs

Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
